text.ru: Roadmap фиксирует последовательность outcomes и release gates. Работы 3.4.0 не начинаются до слияния, проверки, тега и публикации 3.3.4 post-MLS.
text.en: The roadmap defines an outcome and release-gate sequence. 3.4.0 does not start until post-MLS 3.3.4 is merged, verified, tagged and published.

rows.ru: Tests, docs, verification, immutable tag, GitHub Release, artifact smoke evidence
rows.en: Tests, docs, verification, immutable tag, GitHub Release, artifact smoke evidence

blocks.value:
flowchart LR
  A[3.3.4 post-MLS] --> B[3.4.0 Stable Core]
  B --> C[3.5.0 Mobile Continuity]
  C --> D[3.6.0 Connect]
  D --> E[3.7.0 Communities]
  E --> F[3.8.0 Workspaces]
  F --> G[3.9.0 Ecosystem]
  G --> H[3.10.0 Cloud Services]
  H --> I[3.11.0 Organizations]
  I --> J[4.0.0 Nexora Platform]

rows.ru: Signed stable 3.x on the post-MLS server-readable core with verified migration, backup/restore and a safe updater.
rows.en: Signed stable 3.x on the post-MLS server-readable core with verified migration, backup/restore and a safe updater.

rows.ru: Reliable continuity across Windows, PWA and Android: drafts/outbox, background sync, privacy-safe notifications and resumable media.
rows.en: Reliable continuity across Windows, PWA and Android: drafts/outbox, background sync, privacy-safe notifications and resumable media.

rows.ru: Contacts, privacy, blocking, safe deep links and one-to-one voice calling.
rows.en: Contacts, privacy, blocking, safe deep links and one-to-one voice calling.

rows.ru: Communities and channels with onboarding, granular permissions, moderation and anti-abuse controls.
rows.en: Communities and channels with onboarding, granular permissions, moderation and anti-abuse controls.

rows.ru: Tasks, boards, milestones, shared files, reminders and bounded declarative automations.
rows.en: Tasks, boards, milestones, shared files, reminders and bounded declarative automations.

rows.ru: Scoped applications, signed webhooks, grants and an isolated extension runtime.
rows.en: Scoped applications, signed webhooks, grants and an isolated extension runtime.

rows.ru: Optional account linking, push relay, encrypted backup, remote connectivity and fleet status without message plaintext custody.
rows.en: Optional account linking, push relay, encrypted backup, remote connectivity and fleet status without message plaintext custody.

rows.ru: Multi-server organization management, policies, audit and licensing without Cloud ownership of local message content.
rows.en: Multi-server organization management, policies, audit and licensing without Cloud ownership of local message content.

rows.ru: Stable API/event contracts, modular server, scalable storage, SDK, 3.x migration and LTS operations.
rows.en: Stable API/event contracts, modular server, scalable storage, SDK, 3.x migration and LTS operations.

text.ru: Outcome: Signed stable 3.x on the post-MLS server-readable core with verified migration, backup/restore and a safe updater.
text.en: Outcome: Signed stable 3.x on the post-MLS server-readable core with verified migration, backup/restore and a safe updater.

rows.ru: Signed Windows distribution and immutable assets; Post-MLS data integrity and read-only legacy history; Sessions/devices without Trust Core; Verified backup, restore and migration; Independent security review; Diagnostics and operator evidence
rows.en: Signed Windows distribution and immutable assets; Post-MLS data integrity and read-only legacy history; Sessions/devices without Trust Core; Verified backup, restore and migration; Independent security review; Diagnostics and operator evidence

rows.ru: Any message/history loss during upgrade; Legacy MLS write path remains available; Unsigned or tampered updater asset accepted; Incompatible restore mixes DB/files; Unresolved high/critical finding
rows.en: Any message/history loss during upgrade; Legacy MLS write path remains available; Unsigned or tampered updater asset accepted; Incompatible restore mixes DB/files; Unresolved high/critical finding

rows.ru: MLS/Trust Core return or replacement E2EE; Federation, video calls or screen sharing; Mandatory Cloud account; Unrelated UI redesign
rows.en: MLS/Trust Core return or replacement E2EE; Federation, video calls or screen sharing; Mandatory Cloud account; Unrelated UI redesign

text.ru: Planned. Не использовать прошедшее время и не трактовать как реализованную функцию.
text.en: Planned. Do not describe this scope in the past tense or as implemented functionality.
